Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x26D0 "RADIUS-26D0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Radius.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Although the game provides the Micro Painter game to play during loading, the loading screen bitmap by Robert Whitaker is actually present in the data. This was reconstructed and provided on Lemon64 (https://www.lemon64.com/games/details.php?ID=2070). Therefore, this has been used for the CRT file.
